# Solo Bizz

> Solo Bizz is a calm, all-in-one CRM and finance tracker for psychologists, therapists, coaches and tutors running solo practices. Manage clients, sessions, payments and income in one place.

Solo Bizz helps solo practitioners replace spreadsheets and scattered tools with a single workspace for client records, session scheduling, payment tracking and income/expense reporting. There is a permanent Free Starter plan (up to 5 active clients) plus paid Solo Practice and Pro Practice plans billed monthly, quarterly or yearly.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing and FAQ.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at Solo Bizz.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect, use, store and protect personal data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Terms of use, plans, billing and acceptable use.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): How Solo Bizz uses essential cookies and analytics.

## Optional

- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Account access for existing and new users.
